data.content: Implementation review approved: dispatch pool settings now use a single global swap control (bottom of Pools section), per-step swap UI is removed, global replacement updates all matching steps in one save, and swapPoolAgent correctly merges weights when target already exists. Verification: targeted eslint on touched files passed; bun run test passed; bunx tsc --noEmit passed after regenerating .next types; NODE_ENV=production bun run build passed. Note: plain bun run lint currently fails due linting generated/auxiliary files under .claude worktrees/.knots/.next in this checkout.
